program_start_prompt:
Welcome to the gemini cli application.
Press 1 for new stateless chat
2 to list AI Models
3 to get AI Model details
4 to initiate one time conversation
5 to initiate manually managed chat via generate content api
6 To list the conversations done by generate content api
7 To retrieve and continue existing conversation
8 To delete a conversation
generate_content_user_prompt:
Note: This is a one time conversation with the model.
Ask Anything..
ask_stateless_conv_topic_user_prompt: Please provide the topic for this conversationn
select_conversation_list_user_prompt: select conversation for displaying entire conversation history
delete_conversation_list_user_prompt: select conversation to delete it permanently
continue_chat_user_prompt:
Hello, Please continue your conversation.
Ask Anything..
ask_ai_model_name_for_details_user_promp: please provide the model name for details
